page_metadata.biotools__summary: BlobToolKit Viewer is a genome-scale dataset visualistion tool developed as part of the blobtoolkit project to allow browser-based identification and filtering of target and non-target data in genome assemblies.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BlobToolKit Viewer is a genome-scale dataset visualistion tool developed as part of the blobtoolkit project to allow browser-based identification and filtering of target and non-target data in genome assemblies.
